allow: PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'echo USER=$\(whoami\); echo HOME=$HOME; command -v tar >/dev/null && echo TAR_OK || echo TAR_MISSING; [ -d /home/user/Github ] && echo GITHUB_EXISTS || echo GITHUB_MISSING; [ -e /home/user/Github/stitch_my_recipes ] && echo DEST_EXISTS || echo DEST_CLEAR; [ -d /mnt/c/Users/User/Downloads/stitch_my_recipes ] && echo SOURCE_VISIBLE || echo SOURCE_NOT_VISIBLE')
Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'echo PATH=$PATH; command -v node; command -v npm; ls ~/.nvm 2>/dev/null && echo HAS_NVM')
